name: llm_scorer_raw_transcript_optin
description: Demonstrates `llm_scorer_raw_transcript: true`, which appends the agent's full raw CLI transcript to the LLM judge prompt as an extra `## Raw CLI Output` section alongside the default structured view. Opt in only when the evaluation depends on event-level transcript inspection.
llm_scorer_instruction: Use the structured `## Agent Output` section to check the reply; consult `## Raw CLI Output` only if event-level inspection is required.

turns.message: What is the capital of France? Reply with just the city name on its own line.
